items.title: [codex] Deepen scenario report page generator
items.current_gate: GitHub Actions Test / Build and Test queued; all shorter gates passed
items.why_not_merged: Main requires the iOS Build and Test lane to finish green before this report-generator work can merge.
progress: Generates 264 per-scenario pages instead of one giant page.
Includes structured flow, attempted test, results, UI/UX polish, performance, product cohesion, skill grounding, and evidence gaps.
#726 was merged into this branch to add data integrity, navigation restoration, viewport coverage, and media session/background continuity dimensions.
items.next_action: Merge when all required checks pass; if a required check fails, inspect the log before changing code.

items.title: [codex] Add NMP and Chirp sync audit
items.current_gate: GitHub Actions Test / Build and Test in progress
items.why_not_merged: The audit branch is mergeable, but the required iOS Build and Test lane has not completed.
progress: Documents Pod0's NMP pin against NMP master and Chirp's current NMP dependency.
Captures the expected follow-up risk that Pod0 is behind the NMP revision used by Chirp.
items.next_action: Merge after required checks pass, then refresh the live report's NMP status.

items.title: Fix xcodebuild false-red CI chunks
items.current_gate: GitHub Actions Test / Build and Test failed
items.why_not_merged: The required job saw real UI test failures before a later chunk printed TEST SUCCEEDED; merging would put a red required check on main.
progress: The wrapper-fix intent is still valid, but the current run exposed UI instability outside the wrapper change.
StressUITests.testFFIRapidSubscribeUnsubscribe failed because the Show options flow could not find Follow after unsubscribe; tracked as issue #727.
AutoDownloadUITests.testAutoDownloadPolicyUIPath failed once because the show settings sheet did not expose the Auto-download section/header and All new segment before retry; tracked as issue #728.
items.next_action: Investigate issues #727 and #728 on main or in a dedicated fix branch, then rerun #723 after the UI reliability failures are either fixed or proven unrelated.

items.title: [codex] Add scenario report taxonomy gaps
items.why_not_merged: This was intentionally stacked on #722, so it was folded into the template branch rather than merged directly to main.
progress: Grounded the page contract in npx skills search results for mobile app UI design and iOS Liquid Glass.
Added scenario dimensions for data integrity/state sync, navigation restoration, device/viewport coverage, and media session/background continuity.
items.next_action: Let #722's combined branch finish required checks.
